auth.title: Ulises — Login
auth.setup_title: First-time setup — create your admin account

errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least {{min}} characters
errors.too_many_requests: Too many requests — try again later
errors.registration_disabled: Registration is disabled. Ask an admin for an account.

admin.open_signup_desc: Allow anyone to create an account from the login page

chat.title: Ulises Chat
chat.nobody_mode_title: Enable Nobody mode — no memory, no history saved

desktop: Tip: Press Ctrl+K to search across all your conversations.
Tip: Press Ctrl+B to quickly toggle the sidebar.
Tip: Shift-click the sidebar toggle to swap it to the other side.
Tip: Drag and drop files onto the chat to attach them.
Tip: Right-click a session for rename, delete, and memory options.
phone: Tip: Long-press a session for rename, delete, and memory options.
Tip: Tap the eye icon for Nobody mode — no history saved.
Tip: Switch to Agent mode for web search and code execution.
Tip: Use Compare mode to test different models side by side.
Tip: Attach images or files using the + button next to the input.
tips.setup: Type /setup, then choose Local models or API.

tool_indicators.research_title: Deep Research active — click to deactivate
tool_indicators.group_title: Group Chat active — click to deactivate

model_picker.no_model: No model selected for this chat. Open the model picker and choose one before sending.
model_picker.model_removed: Selected model endpoint was removed. Pick another model in Settings.

errors.no_active_run: No active run for this session
errors.no_active_stream: No active stream for this session
errors.image_gen_disabled: Image generation is disabled by the administrator.

browse.heading: Memories
browse.description: Long-term facts the AI remembers across chats — recall, edit, or curate.
browse.tidy_title: AI tidy: deduplicate and clean up memories

add.heading: Add Memory
add.import_desc: Import a .txt, .md, .pdf, .csv, .log, .json, .py, .js, or .html file — the AI reads it and suggests candidate memories you can approve.
add.input_placeholder: Add a memory — e.g. 'I prefer concise replies'

add_skill.heading: Add Skill
add_skill.import_desc: Import a skill from GitHub or skills.sh (folder with SKILL.md and optional templates).
add_skill.url_placeholder: Import URL — e.g. GitHub tree link to a skill folder
add_skill.create_desc: Or create a skill by hand — title, what it solves, and an approach.
add_skill.when_placeholder: When to use — what problem does this skill solve?
add_skill.how_placeholder: How — the approach, steps, commands, or rules to follow
add_skill.tags_placeholder: Tags — comma-separated, e.g. python, build, vllm

skills.heading: Skills
skills.inject_toggle: Inject relevant skills into chat context
skills.description: Reusable procedures the AI can call via /skill — sort by confidence to surface the proven ones.
skills.audit_title: Test every skill, auto-fix the weak ones, flag what still fails
skills.bulk_delete_nonpassing_title: Delete selected duplicates, generic/irrelevant skills, failed audits, and skills below threshold

settings.auto_skills_desc: Automatically draft reusable skills from your workflows. Audit all can publish passing skills using the threshold below.
settings.auto_skills_note: The library can grow; cleanup retires weak/duplicate skills only after review.
settings.auto_approve_desc: Audit all publishes passing, necessary skills at or above this confidence. Off = keep audit results as drafts unless manually approved.
settings.inject_desc: Controls how many relevant published or approved skills are added to each agent request.
settings.max_skills_hint: Set to 0 to disable skill injection.

theme.title: Theme
theme.peek_title: Fade this window to preview the page behind it

customize.custom_fonts_hint: Drop .woff2, .ttf, or .otf files into static/fonts/custom/ and reload — they'll appear in the Font dropdown above.

inject.temperature_tip: Controls randomness. Lower values give focused, deterministic answers (good for code). Higher values give more creative, varied responses.
inject.max_tokens_tip: Maximum length of the AI response. 'No limit' lets the model decide when to stop.

persona.label: Persona
persona.name: Name
persona.delete_title: Delete this persona and its memories
persona.prompt_placeholder: Write rough notes and click Expand, or leave empty
persona.expand_title: AI expand — turn your notes into a full system prompt

settings.title: Settings
settings.peek_title: Fade this window to preview the page behind it

ai_defaults.desc_default_chat: The model used when creating a new chat session.
ai_defaults.add_fallback_title: Add a model to try if the one above fails
ai_defaults.utility_desc: Runs background tasks (compaction, cleanup, auto-naming, retrieving memories from files) on a small/local model instead of your chat model. Leave blank to use the chat model.
ai_defaults.add_utility_fallback_title: Add a model to try if the utility model fails
ai_defaults.vision_toggle_title: Analyze images with a vision-capable model
ai_defaults.vision_desc: Analyze images with a vision-capable model.
ai_defaults.vision_fallback_title: Add a vision model to try if the one above fails
ai_defaults.research_desc: Model used for Deep Research, more settings under Search →
ai_defaults.image_gen_desc: Configure which model to use for image generation.
ai_defaults.tts_desc: Configure TTS provider for assistant message read-aloud.
ai_defaults.email_safety_desc: When on, agent send_email / reply_to_email tools stage a draft for your approval in the chat instead of SMTPing immediately. Stops models from inventing a signature and sending it to a real recipient before you can review.

search.web_search_desc: Search API used for web search and deep research.
search.test_title: Run a test query against the configured provider
search.results_hint: How many web search results to fetch per query
search.fallbacks_title: Providers tried in order when the primary fails or hits a rate limit
search.add_fallback_title: Add a search provider to try if the primary fails
search.deep_research_desc: Deep Research runtime settings. Default Model is picked in AI Defaults →
search.extract_timeout_tip: How long the researcher waits for a single URL to fetch and extract before giving up on it. Slow sites get skipped. Default 90 seconds.
search.extract_parallel_tip: How many URLs the researcher fetches and extracts in parallel. Higher is faster but uses more memory/CPU. Default 3.

sidebar_sections.settings_hint: Cog next to user — re-open with /settings

chat_area.title: Chat Area
chat_area.sensitive_hint: Blur emails, tokens, and secrets in AI output

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Click a shortcut to rebind. Press Escape to cancel.

email_settings.accounts_desc: Add, edit, delete, and test accounts in Integrations.
email_settings.tasks_desc: Manage email background tasks in Tasks.
email_settings.writing_style_desc: AI-extracted from your sent emails. Used when AI drafts replies.
email_settings.writing_style_placeholder: e.g. I write emails in this style. I don't use exclamation marks. I sign emails with: ...

reminders.desc: Controls how fired note reminders are delivered.
reminders.config_hint: Configure email account, ntfy server, etc. in Integrations.
reminders.ai_synthesis_title: Use the utility model to write reminder messages
reminders.ai_synthesis_desc: When on, the utility model writes a short, warm one-line reminder for browser, email, ntfy, and webhook reminders instead of just the raw note content.
reminders.persona_title: Optional — write the reminder in the voice of a saved character
reminders.public_url_desc: Used to build clickable links back to Ulises inside outgoing reminder / urgent-email emails (e.g. https://chat.yourdomain.com). Leave blank to omit links.

add_models.scan_title: Scan your network for running model servers
add_models.api_key_toggle_title: Show / hide the API key field
add_models.local_desc: Add a local model server (Ollama, llama.cpp, vLLM).
add_models.api_key_placeholder: API key (optional — for protected local endpoints)
add_models.api_desc: Connect a cloud provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, OpenRouter, etc.).

added_models.title: Added Models
added_models.probe_title: Re-test every endpoint and refresh online status
added_models.clear_offline_title: Remove all endpoints currently marked offline
added_models.desc: Endpoints you've connected. Probe re-tests them all; Clear offline removes the dead ones.
added_models.no_offline: No offline endpoints — nothing to clear

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.desc: All external service connections in one place.

agent_tools.desc: Controls for the agent tool loop.
agent_tools.builtin_tools_desc: Enable or disable tools available to the AI agent.

system.logs_desc: Live diagnostic logs and system output from the Ulises process.
system.backup_desc: Export or import your user data (memories, presets, settings, skills, preferences) as a JSON file.
system.danger_desc: Irreversible. Each wipe targets one category — pick exactly what you want gone.

wipe.chats_desc: Every session, message, and chat history. Documents/notes/etc. stay.
wipe.memory_desc: Clears memory.json, the Memory table, and the vector store. Skills not affected.
wipe.skills_desc: Drops data/skills/ (all SKILL.md files). Memory not affected.
wipe.tasks_desc: Every scheduled task and its run history (Tasks tool).
wipe.documents_desc: Every document and version. Drafts, exports, library — all gone.
wipe.gallery_desc: Every image record and the upload directory on disk.
wipe.calendar_desc: Every event and every calendar (incl. CalDAV-synced ones; resync to restore).
wipe.everything_desc: All eight categories above, in one go. Same effect as wiping each one in sequence.

errors.reinstall_cuda: Reinstalling llama-cpp-python with CUDA wheels on {{host}} (~1-3 min)...
errors.rebuild_done: {{action}} llama.cpp build on {{host}}. Re-launch the serve task to rebuild.
errors.hf_repo_hint: Enter a full HuggingFace repo ID like "org/model-name", or an Ollama name like "qwen2.5:14b".
errors.gguf_hint: Pick a GGUF quant first. Ulises will not download the whole GGUF repo without an include pattern.
errors.gguf_download_hint: Pick the GGUF quant, then press Download again.
errors.revived: {{name}} is still downloading (was marked finished after a restart — revived)
errors.model_not_downloaded: Model not downloaded yet — starting download...
errors.download_first: Download the model first, then configure from Serve tab
errors.retrying_download: Retrying download — progress may look reset...
errors.no_model_info: No model info on this task
errors.kill_failed: Kill failed — session may still be running...
errors.select_gguf: Select at least one GGUF file.
errors.no_gpu_data: No GPU memory probe data available
errors.diffusers_warning: Diffusers serving is not supported on remote Windows servers...
errors.model_not_cached: Model not found in cache — switch to the Serve tab manually

document.email_account_receive_only: Selected email account is receive-only; using your SMTP account.
document.ai_reply_edited: AI reply ready, but draft was edited

editor.inpaint_hint: Draw the area you want to inpaint first
editor.inpaint_complete: Inpaint complete — drag Edge feather / Edge stroke to blend
editor.outpaint_no_empty: No empty areas to outpaint — canvas is fully covered.
editor.harmonize_needs_second: Harmonize needs a second layer pasted/imported...

calendar.end_after_start: End time must be after start time

errors.forbidden: Forbidden — user can't access that URL
errors.not_found_url: Not found — check the URL path
errors.redirect_not_followed: Redirects are not followed for CalDAV safety; use the final URL
errors.no_start_time: Model did not produce a start time

admin.no_offline: No offline endpoints — nothing to clear

errors.no_models_found: No models found or endpoint offline

research.no_research: No research found for this session
research.no_report: No visual report available for this session
research.not_allowed: Your account is not allowed to use research.
research.endpoint_no_model: Endpoint is not configured with a usable model.
research.no_endpoints: No endpoints configured. Add one in Settings first.

voice.stt_unavailable: STT service not available or set to browser mode

webhook.endpoint_requires_token: This endpoint requires an API token
webhook.token_not_scoped: API token is not scoped for chat
webhook.no_session_api_key: No session, api_key, or configured endpoints. Pass api_key + model, or configure an endpoint in Admin.
webhook.could_not_discover: Could not discover models from endpoint

ntfy.sent_instruction: Sent to {{url}} — on your ntfy app, subscribe to topic "{{topic}}" with server "{{base}}" (or paste the full URL: {{full_url}}).
ntfy.no_webhook_url: No webhook URL set — paste the full Discord webhook URL into the Base URL field.
ntfy.test_sent: Test embed sent — check your Discord channel to confirm it arrived.

backup.no_data_found: No recognized data found in the file

embedding.cannot_delete_active: Cannot delete the active embedding model
embedding.no_cache_source: No cache source for this model

shell.no_installable: No installable packages requested (allowlist: cmake, build-essential, g++, gcc, git, tmux, make)
shell.vllm_not_found: vLLM CLI not found on PATH.
shell.diffusers_needs_torch: Diffusers serving needs both diffusers and torch.
shell.pty_not_supported: PTY streaming is not supported on this platform

skills.audit_flagged: Audit flagged the skill as generic or unnecessary

companion.pair_desc: Generate a one-time pairing code (a chat-scoped API token) for a LAN client.
companion.admin_note: Admin only. Each code mints a new token, shown once. Manage or revoke under Settings → API tokens.
companion.shown_once: Shown once. This grants chat access to your Ulises; revoke it in Settings → API tokens (id ...). The device must be on the same network, and the server must bind to your LAN.
companion.qr_unavailable: QR rendering unavailable -- enter the details manually.

mcp.auth_connecting: The MTP server is connecting. You can close this window and return to Ulises.
mcp.no_auth_code: No authorization code found in the URL. Make sure you copied the full URL from your browser.
mcp.connected: {{name}} connected with {{count}} tools. You can close this window.
mcp.connection_failed_desc: Tokens saved, but the server failed to connect: {{error}}. Try reconnecting from Settings.
mcp.step1: 1. Click the button below to sign in with Google
mcp.step2: 2. After approving, your browser will show an error page — that's normal
mcp.step3: 3. Copy the full URL from your browser's address bar
mcp.step4: 4. Paste it below and click Connect
mcp.paste_url: Paste the URL from your browser after signing in:

ai_interaction.pipeline_format: Each line must be: model | instruction (or use JSON format)
ai_interaction.memory_edit_needs: Edit needs line 2: memory_id, line 3: new text
ai_interaction.memory_unknown_action: Unknown action '{{action}}'. Use: list, add, edit, delete, search
ai_interaction.rag_unknown_action: Unknown action '{{action}}'. Use: list, add_directory, remove_directory
ai_interaction.theme_invalid_hex: Invalid hex color for {{key}}: '{{value}}'. Use format #RRGGBB
ai_interaction.panel_unknown: Unknown panel '{{panel}}'. Valid: documents, gallery, email, sessions, notes, memories, skills, settings, cookbook.
ai_interaction.unknown_action: Unknown action '{{action}}'. Use: toggle, set_mode, switch_model, set_theme, highlight, clear_highlight, get_toggles
ai_interaction.no_image_model: No image model found. Configure one in Admin → Image Generation.
ai_interaction.no_endpoint_with_model: No endpoint found with image model '{{model}}'. Configure an OpenAI-compatible endpoint with image generation support.
ai_interaction.unsafe_image_url: Image API returned unsafe image URL: {{reason}}
ai_interaction.unexpected_image_format: Image API returned unexpected format (no b64_json or url)
ai_interaction.image_gen_timed_out: Image generation timed out (300s). The model may be overloaded — try again or use quality=low.

agent_tools.bash_timed_out: bash: timed out after {{timeout}}s — process killed
agent_tools.python_timed_out: python: timed out after {{timeout}}s — process killed
agent_tools.session_format: Need 2 lines: session name, then model spec
agent_tools.need_session_id: Need a session_id (or 'current' for the active chat)

rag.no_embedding_accepted: No embedding lane accepted the batch

integration.path_no_protocol: Path must not contain a protocol scheme
integration.path_no_fragment: Path must not contain a fragment

session.unstar_before_delete: Unstar the session before deleting it

copilot.no_device_code: GitHub did not return a device code
